forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action. Contact your administrator or sign in again.
unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
serverError: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
unexpectedServerError: The business API returned an unexpected error. If you recently updated the frontend, restart the business backend on port 8081.
networkError: Unable to reach the service. Check your connection and that all backend services are running.
currentRoleHint: Current role: {{roleName}}. If you recently received new permissions, sign out and sign in again.
userLimitReached: You've reached your plan's user limit. Contact your provider to upgrade the plan or free up a seat by disabling an existing user.
